title: Caldera - Data Collection from Network Shared Drive (Linux)
description: Detects collection of data from mounted network shares on Linux hosts. Caldera T1039 emulation accesses SMB/CIFS and NFS mounts, lists their contents, and copies files to a staging location. Patterns include smbclient interactive commands, direct reads from /mnt share paths, and cifs-utils access.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*smbclient //*' or msg like '*smbclient -L*' or msg like '*smbclient -U*')) or ((msg like '*mount -t cifs*' or msg like '*mount -t nfs*' or msg like '*mount -t smbfs*' or msg like '*mount.cifs*')) or ((msg like '*ls /mnt/*' or msg like '*cp /mnt/*' or msg like '*find /mnt/*' or msg like '*find /media/*' or msg like '*rsync /mnt/*')) or ((msg like '*smb: \\\\> get*' or msg like '*smb: \\\\> mget*' or msg like '*smb: \\\\> lcd*')))
falsepositives: Authorized backup agents reading from network shares
File servers serving content from mounted volumes
